outcome_summary: Routine session S-0115 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-AES landed an 11-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics + S-0109 metaphysics + S-0110 mind + S-0111 logic + S-0112 language + S-0113 science + S-0114 political precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/aesthetics.md (181 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 10 sound (6 sound-high + 4 sound-medium), 1 defensible-medium (E-3 fictional_truthâ†’metaphor â€” NEW cross-cluster-theoretical-thread-ordering reversal shape: SEP-canonical "Metaphor" entry-point treats Black 1962 / Goodman 1968 / Searle 1979 / Davidson 1978 as the canonical entry, none requiring fictional-truth machinery first; the seed direction is supportable on the niche Walton 1993 "Metaphor and Prop Oriented Make-Believe" theoretical thread that extends the make-believe framework to handle metaphor as prop-oriented-make-believe, but contradicts the canonical entry-point ordering; distinct in shape from prior reversal patterns â€” S-0112 deflationaryâ†’T-schema within-subdomain tools-vs-position, S-0114 social_contractâ†’legitimacy question-vs-answer, S-0105 inductionâ†’pyrrhonian frameworks-vs-motivations, S-0108 animal_ethicsâ†’sentientism position-vs-criterion, S-0110 hard_problemâ†’explanatory_gap argument-vs-position, S-0112/S-0113 developmental-arc â€” this is CROSS-CLUSTER-THEORETICAL-THREAD-ORDERING). Node-verdict tally: 7 sound-high + 1 sound-medium (N-7 art recorded as candidate CATEGORY-LABEL-WITH-CONTENT third-class observation for the closeout's `discipline_label_node_at_root` soft-warn aggregation â€” distinct from top-level discipline labels (philosophy_of_X, political_philosophy, aesthetics) and from sub-discipline labels with substantive content (bayesian_epistemology at S-0105 N-8, moral_epistemology at S-0108 N-4, animal_ethics at S-0108 N-9, modality at S-0109 N-4, mereology at S-0109 N-6); art parallels knowledge / morality / consciousness / scientific_theory / justice â€” broad category-labels that name the philosophical object the discipline studies, with substantive theoretical content). 0 granularity-mismatch verdicts. Substantive defects: 1 of 19 sampled elements (5.3%) â€” second-LOWEST within-subdomain rate of the routine block (only above S-0111 logic 5% and S-0105 epistemology 5.4%); below S-0110 mind 10.8%, S-0113 science 10.5%, S-0114 political 10%, S-0109 metaphysics 14.3%, S-0108 ethics 16.7%, S-0112 language 21%; well below the cross-bridge baseline (35.2% per AUDIT-CB at S-0104). The pattern fits the structural prediction that aesthetics is a theoretical-taxonomy-anchored subdomain (imitation/expression/formalism/institutional/historical theory-of-art; aesthetic-attitude/Beardsley/Bell/Walton/Goodman aesthetic-experience theories; Walton/Lewis fictional-truth frameworks; cognitivist/pragmatic/causalist metaphor positions) with well-calibrated canonical theoretical taxonomies â€” cleaner than richly-contested philosophical-position subdomains, approaching formal-systems-anchored subdomain rates. Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample â†’ expand to 50%) was below the trigger â€” half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-6) was 1/6 = 16.7%; standard 35% density held. ONE defensible verdict (E-3) is a NEW shape: cross-cluster-theoretical-thread-ordering, where a specific niche theoretical extension (Walton 1993 prop-oriented-make-believe) supports the seed's cross-cluster bridge against the canonical entry-point ordering of the target node (the SEP "Metaphor" entry-point treats Black/Goodman/Searle/Davidson as the canonical entry); distinct in kind from all prior reversal/defensibility shapes. Three sound-medium edge verdicts recorded as discipline-label foundation-spine instances for closeout aggregate-scan: E-4 aestheticsâ†’aesthetic_judgment, E-8 aestheticsâ†’aesthetic_property, E-11 aestheticsâ†’art_criticism (concentrated single-session instance with THREE foundation-spine edges from the discipline-label node `aesthetics` alone in this routine fire â€” densest single-session sampled instance in the routine block). Three load-bearing aggregate observations surfaced for the closeout: (1) FOURTH SUBDOMAIN exhibiting the TOP-LEVEL-discipline-label-as-prereq foundation-spine pattern, with the densest single-session sampled instance in the routine block (three foundation-spine edges from aesthetics alone); closeout may propose differentiating the soft-warn shape by NUMBER of foundation-spine edges sourced from a discipline-label node in addition to the top-level-vs-sub-level differentiation already surfaced at S-0114; (2) NEW cross-cluster-theoretical-thread-ordering reversal shape at E-3 (distinct in kind from prior reversal patterns; closeout adjudicates whether to treat as a NEW gate-feasible audit-system-input class or as a sub-shape of broader tools-vs-theoretical-thread family); (3) NEW category-label-with-content third-class observation at N-7 art â€” closeout may propose a third class for the `discipline_label_node_at_root` validator soft-warn shape (top-level discipline labels / sub-discipline labels with substantive content / category-labels-with-content). No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class authored as deliverable â€” the four pre-listed master-plan proposals + S-0104's `cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary` candidate + S-0110's argument-vs-position directionality candidate were not extended at this routine layer. Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 32 within-aesthetics edges (master-plan Â§T2-E pre-listed; confirmed graph-wide again â€” tenth session in a row with this pattern, after AUDIT-CB / AUDIT-EPI / AUDIT-ETH / AUDIT-MET / AUDIT-MIN / AUDIT-LOG / AUDIT-LAN / AUDIT-SCI / AUDIT-POL). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-3) get fortified at the closeout per master-plan Â§"Forward pointers to closeout" / ADR 0059. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0114 baseline of 5 is unchanged). AUDIT-AES criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-SVC (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied + no other dependencies; service nodes subdomain, 10 of 28 edges at 35% density). 1 subdomain audit + AUDIT-HT remain in T-PHASE-5-AUDIT before closeout.
